a.label: C_epsilon (genus-1 curve)
a.standard_term: epsilon-parametrized Legendre-type genus-1 curve y^2 = x(x-1)(x-m_epsilon)

b.label: u, a_epsilon, b (Weierstrass-model coordinates)
b.standard_term: depressed-cubic (Tschirnhaus) substitution coordinates putting the curve in short Weierstrass form

evidence.label: F_epsilon(b/u) under the complementary substitution
evidence.summary: Under u=m_\epsilon(r^2-1), F_\epsilon(b/u) = A_\epsilon c_\epsilon \frac{1-r^2}{1-\bar m_\epsilon r^2} -B_\epsilon. \tag{4.7}
